notes: Odoo's web client (since v15) is built on Owl.js — many DOM nodes are dynamically generated and lack stable ids.
The Accounting module's vendor bill list is at /odoo/action-account.action_move_in_invoice_type.
Form fields use `<input>` elements with the `name` attribute matching the Odoo model field (partner_id, ref, invoice_date, amount_total, ...).
For inputs that turn into autocomplete dropdowns (like Vendor selector), wait for the .o_input_dropdown to render then click an `<li>` whose `data-id` matches the partner ID.
Top-level menu uses `<a class='o_menu_brand'>` for the home/logo button — useful as an anchor for waitings.
When the Accounting app first opens, an onboarding panel may appear — close with `button[name='action_dismiss']`.
URL routes are stable across versions: /web/login, /odoo, /odoo/accounting, /odoo/inventory, etc.

login_email.selector: <html app='chrome.exe' url='*odoo*login*' /><webctrl tag='input' id='login' name='login' type='text' />

login_password.selector: <html app='chrome.exe' url='*odoo*login*' /><webctrl tag='input' id='password' name='password' type='password' />

login_submit_button.selector: <html app='chrome.exe' url='*odoo*login*' /><webctrl tag='button' type='submit' aaname='Log in' />

main_menu_brand.description: Home/brand link in the top menu — used as a 'logged-in' anchor

accounting_menu.description: Accounting app tile on the main /odoo dashboard

vendor_bills_menu_item.description: Vendor Bills item under the Vendors top menu

new_button.description: New button on the vendor bill list view

vendor_field_input.description: Vendor (partner) selector input on the vendor bill form

invoice_date_input.description: Invoice Date input on vendor bill form

currency_dropdown.description: Currency picker on the vendor bill form

total_amount_field.description: Computed total amount span on the vendor bill form

save_button.description: Manual save button (cloud icon) when form is in unsaved/dirty state

user_menu.selector: <html app='chrome.exe' url='*odoo*' /><webctrl tag='button' class='dropdown-toggle' aaname='User Menu' />
user_menu.description: User menu in the top-right corner — opens log-out option

logout_link.description: Log out link inside the user menu dropdown
